narrative:
Willoughby-Eastlake City Sd city school district has 45,559 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.0% D−R vs +0.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
